snacks
tuna tartar - yu xiang  sichuan fragrant delicious sauce , beef fat hashbrowns
bing - whipped feta, charred eggplant ginger scallion and xiao bao chili garlic sauce

dumplings & noodles
BAO BUNS gua bao taiwanese classic pork belly pickles peanuts - housemade bao
fried dumplings  lemongrass pork  + peanut mochi dumplings **
NOODLES*  biang biang hand pulled noodles with chili cumin brisket, trumpet mushrooms, yu choi    (can be veg and stil delicious)
shared plates
la zi Cauliflower*  - Sichuan ma la classic stir fry, here it’s cauliflower so it’s completely vegetarian and super delicious -
okonomiyaki - Japanese “hashbrown” pancake in a unique style we learned while farming in Japan -   add egg, katsuo, pork candy
crab rice - Thai style fried rice with jumbo lump, butter, citrus (veg option iwth oyster and trumpet mushrooms) add spicy chili
rendang -Indo chicken curry + sticky rice
from 11am - 3:59pm

okonomiyaki - Japanese “hashbrown” pancake in a unique style we learned while farming in Japan add egg, katsuo, pork candy
